sections.title: Attempting to enter the arena before talking to Minimus

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Oi! Where d'you think you're going? Come and speak to me before you go wondering through there. You'll get yourself killed!

sections.title: Attempting to use the bank chest without enough Glory

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Oi, get yer hands off that! It's reserved for survivors of the Colosseum.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Welcome, Rookie.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: This place...? Why, This is the great Fortis Colosseum!

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Adventurers come from near and far to test their might within these walls.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds exciting!

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Indeed it is. If you are victorious in the Colosseum, the whole of Varlamore shall hear of your name.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I imagine its quite the challenge then?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: It'll put your skills to the test alright.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I participate?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Just head through that tunnel behind me and we'll get the show started! Make sure you've got everything you need. Once you're in you can't leave until the end of a wave!

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Come and ask if you have any other questions.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about modifiers?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Yes! After all, they were my idea...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh...

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Every time you complete a wave, I'll offer you a choice of three modifiers.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Each modifier will increase the challenge for the rest of the run - So choose wisely!

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Some modifiers can be offered multiple times, with the effects then growing in power!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the heads up!

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Was there anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get rewarded?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Well it's a bit different to just killing monsters and picking up items, as I'm sure you're used to...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How so?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: After each wave inside the Colosseum, I'll show you the rewards you have earned, as well as what you'll earn from the next wave...

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: If you aren't confident that you can complete the next wave, you can claim your existing rewards and exit early.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: However, if you're confident you can beat the next wave, you can risk your whole reward pile to get even more!

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Be careful though. If you die or leave the arena before claiming your loot from me, you will lose all of the rewards you've earned.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I'm guessing the higher the wave, the better the rewards?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Oh, you're good. Exactly that!

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Even better - if you manage to finish all of the waves and the final challenge, then you'll be awarded with Dizana's Quiver.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: It's a handy piece of kit that you wear on your back to store extra bolts or arrows.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That does sound handy! Thanks for explaining all of that.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Anytime, Rookie. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is Glory?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: It's the measure of your progress inside the Colosseum.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Speak to Gloria over there if you want to know the details.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: I'm Minimus. It's not my real name of course, but it seems to have stuck. I started out competing here as a gladiator when I was a young'n. After that I became one of the lanistas.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Lanistas?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: The ones responsible for overseeing the selecting and training of the gladiators.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Eventually, the kingdom gave me the role of Colosseum Master. I still make sure to fit some fighting in, but now I have the honor of managing the fights themselves.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So are you not training like the rest of the gladiators?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: I have no need! I'm already one of the greatest fighters to grace this arena.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you at a disadvantage because of your height?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: No! How dare you even suggest that! Those spindly human bodies are unfit to go toe to toe with a fine dwarf like myself!

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Now, did you need anything else?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Farewell, Rookie.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Welcome, [rank].

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: A [rank] approaches!

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Let me know when you want to begin.

sections.title: Right-Click Leave while inside the Fortis Colosseum

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Leaving now will forfeit your run, with you only being rewarded the items you have earned so far.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: It was a valiant effort, [rank]. I've popped all your earned rewards into that chest over there. You can retrieve them from it when ready.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, I'd better stay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a spare Dizana's quiver (uncharged).

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: You want to offer it for some Sunfire splinters? I could also try to convince Smol Heredit to follow you.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: But be aware, you will not get the quiver back.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Very well, Grand Champion. Keep your trophy.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: It doesn't actually look like you have enough space to carry 4,000 Sunfire splinters. Come back when you have room.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Very well, Grand Champion. Keep your trophy.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: He doesn't want to go with you. Sorry.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: He seems to like you. Smol heredit is yours.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Very well, Grand Champion. Keep your trophy.

sections.title: Exchanging a quiver after the player has received Smol Heredit

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a spare Dizana's quiver (uncharged).

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: You want to offer it for some Sunfire splinters?

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: But be aware, you will not get the quiver back.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Very well, Grand Champion. Keep your trophy.

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: Very well, Grand Champion. Keep your trophy.

sections.title: Attempting to exchange a blessed Dizana's quiver

lines.speaker: Minimus
lines.text: I'm afraid you can only offer spare uncharged versions of the quiver to me.
